candidate_llm_application: LLM output verification by feature-pattern matching: draft model proposes candidate tokens; verifier scores each via weighted-feature comparison against base distribution; accept above threshold.

results.title: Speculative Decoding Verification: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on speculative decoding verification, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
